lawName: Occupational Safety, Health and Working Conditions Code, 2020
overview: Consolidates laws relating to occupational safety, health and working conditions of employees across covered establishments.

definitions.definition: Employer responsible for providing a safe and healthy workplace.
Employee covered under the Occupational Safety, Health and Working Conditions Code.
Premises where employees perform work covered by the Code.

rules.title: Review Applicability of the OSHWC Code
rules.description: Determine whether the establishment falls within the scope of the Occupational Safety, Health and Working Conditions Code.

citations.reference: Occupational Safety, Health and Working Conditions Code, 2020

rules.title: Provide a Safe Working Environment
rules.description: Provide a workplace that complies with statutory occupational safety and health requirements.

rules.title: Conduct Safety Training
rules.description: Provide appropriate safety instruction, training and awareness to employees.

rules.title: Maintain Health and Safety Records
rules.description: Maintain statutory health, safety and inspection records wherever required.

rules.title: Provide Welfare Facilities
rules.description: Provide statutory welfare facilities applicable to the establishment and workforce.

rules.title: Report Serious Workplace Incidents
rules.description: Report occupational accidents and dangerous occurrences wherever required under applicable law.

exceptions.title: Sector Specific Requirements
exceptions.description: Certain industries and establishments may have additional statutory obligations, notifications or rules applicable under the Code.
